THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GARIN EKMEKJIAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT DEMONSTRATES THAT SHE LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE LAWSUIT AND RELIEF IS WARRANTED UNDER CCP 473.5. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Set For Trial On Nov-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Leon Roubinian, Esq., 415.738.8181, for defendant Garin Ekmekjian; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GARIN EKMEKJIAN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant demonstrates that she lacked actual notice of the lawsuit and relief is warranted under CCP 473.5. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
